name: SMTC Corporation
description: Founded in 1985, SMTC Corporation is a mid-size provider of end-to-end electronics manufacturing services (EMS), including printed circuit board assembly, systems integration, and comprehensive testing services. The company also offers enclosure fabrication, product design, sustaining engineering, and supply chain management solutions. With a global footprint spanning the United States, Canada, Mexico, and China, SMTC supports the entire electronic product life cycle, from initial prototype development and new product introduction through to growth, maturity, and end-of-life phases for customers in sectors such as defense, aerospace, medical, and advanced computing.
